---
title: "Winners"
format: html
css: styles3.css
---  

<style>
  body {
   background-image: url("/assets/hoop_night.jpg");
  background-size: cover;
  background-repeat: no-repeat;
}
  
</style>

 <style>
    body {
      color: white;
    }
  </style>
  
# 2026

## Point spread

1. **devig to ball knowledge** 
    - University of North Carolina
    - MAE = 8.629
2. **Not Cute Anymore** 
    - Duke University
    - MAE = 8.6956
3. **DerrickWhiteEnjoyer** 
    - North Carolina State University
    - MAE = 8.8083


## Prediction intervals  

1. **devig to ball knowledge** 
    - University of North Carolina 
    - PIW=22.45   
2. **CalebTruthers** 
    - University of North Carolina 
    - PIW = 22.77
3. **Arjun** 
    - University of North Carolina 
    - PIW = 22.79
  
# 2025

::: {.year-box}
Read about the 2025 winners [here](https://researchblog.duke.edu/2025/04/08/triangle-sports-analytics-competition/)
:::

## Point spread

1.  **WeWant6** - Chris Johnson
2.  **Kenpom Believers** - Daniel Marin
3.  **Cuteness Overload** - Hung-Chun Lu, Zijian Huang

## Prediction intervals

1.  **Kenpom Believers** - Daniel Marin
2.  **WeWant6** - Chris Johnson
3.  **Scalator** - Wonjae Oh, Ethan Youm
